title: cistus × clausonii nothosubsp. crespoi
intro: Cistus × clausonii nothosubsp. crespoi, also known as Cistus x clausonii 'Crespo', is a hybrid plant species within the rockrose family (Cistaceae) that is a cross between Cistus ladanum and Cistus albidus. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Cistus × clausonii nothosubsp. crespoi include reducing inflammation, fighting against infections, and promoting wound healing. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine.
